title: hypericum quadrangulum subsp. desetangsii
intro: Hypericum quadrangulum subsp. desetangsii, also known as Desfontain's St John's Wort, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the St John's Wort genus, characterized by its yellow flowers and medicinal properties. Traditionally, the plant has been used to treat various health conditions due to its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties, which may help alleviate symptoms of anxiety, depression, and wounds. The herbal preparations of Desfontain's St John's Wort, such as infusions, tinctures, and salves, have been used to promote wound healing, reduce inflammation, and soothe skin irritations. However, further research is needed to confirm the efficacy of these preparations and their potential interactions with other medications.
